creator: ozkan.kirik@gmail.com
text:
I hit an issue like this. The e1000 & igb driver doesn't reflect hw
offload capabilities now.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=260068
And the differential https://reviews.freebsd.org/D33154 was created
for the bug reported by me. It's commited to main branch (https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=e0f4cdba533693bb6ef9d90243acdad89605b150)

With the same differential, it will work for you also.
